summary: RTW Summary Logic Bug Fix Verified. All 19 backend tests passed. Frontend verification successful. Time-limited employees correctly show 'Verified (Time-Limited)' with expiry date and days countdown. Permanent employees correctly show 'Verified (Permanent)' with 'No Expiry'. The bug where days_remaining was None due to date parsing issue has been fixed.
passed_tests: ✅ RTW status label shows 'Verified (Time-Limited)' for Ayomi Lori (time-limited employee)
✅ Expiry date is set correctly (2026-09-28) for time-limited employee
✅ days_remaining is correctly calculated (182 days) - NOT None
✅ permission_type is 'time_limited' for Ayomi Lori
✅ checked_at is populated from RTW Verification record
✅ checked_by is populated from RTW Verification record
✅ next_follow_up_due matches expiry date for time-limited
✅ is_blocking is False for verified time-limited RTW
✅ RTW status label shows 'Verified (Permanent)' for Olakunle Alonge (permanent employee)
✅ expiry_date is null for permanent employee
✅ days_remaining is null for permanent employee
✅ permission_type is 'permanent' for Olakunle Alonge
✅ expiry_status is 'permanent' for Olakunle Alonge
✅ is_blocking is False for verified permanent RTW
✅ Time-limited card shows no contradictory 'No Expiry' text
✅ Permanent card shows 'Permanent - No Expiry' correctly
✅ status_band is 'current' for valid RTW (>60 days)
✅ rtw_status_color is 'green' for verified RTW
✅ Frontend RTW card displays correctly for Ayomi Lori: 'Verified (Time-Limited)' with 'Expires: 9/28/2026 (182d)'
✅ Frontend RTW card displays correctly for Olakunle Alonge: 'Verified (Permanent)' with 'Permanent - No Expiry'
critical_code_review_comments: Date parsing fix in get_employee_rtw_summary() (line 1893-1900) correctly handles both ISO format with time ('T' separator) and date-only format (YYYY-MM-DD)
Status labels correctly distinguish 'Verified (Time-Limited)' vs 'Verified (Permanent)' based on expiry_date presence
days_remaining is now correctly calculated for time-limited employees (was None before fix)
Frontend RTW card (lines 1924-1963) correctly displays expiry info for time-limited and 'Permanent - No Expiry' for permanent
checked_at and checked_by fields are populated from RTW Verification record
next_follow_up_due is set to expiry_date for time-limited employees
context_for_next_testing_agent: RTW Summary bug fix verified. Key findings: 1) Date parsing in get_employee_rtw_summary() now handles both ISO format (with 'T') and date-only format (YYYY-MM-DD). 2) days_remaining is correctly calculated (was None before fix). 3) Status labels correctly show 'Verified (Time-Limited)' vs 'Verified (Permanent)'. 4) Frontend RTW card displays correctly without contradictions. Test employees: Ayomi Lori (time-limited, 182 days remaining), Olakunle Alonge (permanent, no expiry).

bug_fix_verification.original_issue: RTW card showing 'Verified (No Expiry)' but also displaying an expiry date underneath - contradictory display
bug_fix_verification.root_cause: Date parsing issue - date formats like '2026-09-28' (without time) were not being parsed correctly, causing days_remaining to be None
bug_fix_verification.fix_applied: Added handling for date-only format (YYYY-MM-DD) in addition to ISO format with time
bug_fix_verification.verification_status: FIXED - All tests pass, frontend displays correctly
